user.title: ReST Performance Bed
user.description: Select a discovered pump or choose manual entry. Each side of a split bed has its own pump — add each separately.

manual.title: Manual Pump Setup
manual.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your ReST bed pump.

confirm.title: ReST Performance Bed Discovered
confirm.description: Found **{name}** on your network. Add this pump?

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the pump. Verify the host and that the pump is on the network.

abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the discovered pump.
abort.not_rest_bed: Discovered device is not a ReST bed pump.

set_wifi.name: Set WiFi credentials
set_wifi.description: Update the WiFi SSID and password on a ReST bed pump. The pump will disconnect and reconnect to the new network. WARNING: If the credentials are wrong the pump will become unreachable until recovered via its direct-mode hotspot.

ssid.name: SSID
ssid.description: The WiFi network name to connect to.
